ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (active, inactive) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exchange was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "crypto_type" TEXT /* Type of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum, altcoin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cryptocurrency was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cryptocurrency's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the data is from */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the data is for */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_num" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "volume_currency" REAL /* Currency of the volume traded */,
  "volume_quote" REAL /* Quote currency of the volume traded */,
  "kline_confirm" INTEGER /* Kline confirmation status */,
  "trading_pair" TEXT /* The trading pair (e.g., BTC/USD, ETH/BTC) */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Price change over the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_7d" REAL /* Price change over the last 7 days */,
  "price_change_30d" REAL /* Price change over the last 30 days */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* Volume change over the last 24 hours */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the market data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for additional contact information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data triggering the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price alert, new data available) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (read, unread) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crypto_exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange rate was last updated */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the exchange rate */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the exchange rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exchange rate was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crypto_exchange_rates_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crypto_exchange_rates_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crypto_price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (triggered, not triggered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price alert was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crypto_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crypto_price_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (active, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data feed was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing to the feed */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date and time the subscription was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_subscriptions_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)
